issues.title: Evidence-supported keywords are under-placed
issues.description: Supported keyword gap(s): AI quality evaluation, benchmark questions, quality metrics, AI governance, prompt regression testing, Python validation.

evidence.reason: These keywords are evidence-supported and may be placed without exceeding ADR-004 boundaries.

issues.suggestedRepairIntent: Add only evidence-supported keywords to summary, skills, or relevant bullets.

issues.title: Internal or work-log wording remains

evidence.reason: Visible wording should be external recruiter language.

issues.suggestedRepairIntent: Translate internal/work-log wording into external resume language without changing meaning.

issues.title: Trusted profile contact data is incomplete

evidence.reason: Profile/contact data must come from trusted user/profile input and must not be invented by Reviewer or Writer.

issues.suggestedRepairIntent: Collect trusted contact data from the user or profile source.
